description: A treasury analyst needs to create a 13-week cash flow forecast for the company.

nodes.task_description: Gather data on expected cash inflows (e.g., accounts receivable) and outflows (e.g., accounts payable, payroll).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls all required data from various financial systems.

nodes.task_description: Input the data into the cash flow forecasting model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately populates the forecasting template.

nodes.task_description: Generate the 13-week forecast and identify any potential future cash shortfalls.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the forecast and highlights a potential liquidity issue in week 9.
